level_signals: experience managing teams and driving large-scale, cross-functional initiatives
base pay range $136,000–$200,000 consistent with Manager/Senior Manager at DoorDash
role owns strategy & execution, reports on initiatives to stakeholders at all levels

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have a Bachelor's degree and 6+ years of experience in consulting, strategy, operations, banking, technology, or related experience
You have a Bachelor's degree and 6+ years of experience in consulting, strategy, operations, banking, technology, or related experience
You're analytical and dig deep to understand a problem, using both quantitative and qualitative data
You have an ownership mentality and are excited to think about problems using first principles, inspiring action to create the future
You lead from the front and inspire followership across levels and functions
You communicate early and often and can distill complex topics into a summary for stakeholders at all levels -- both written and verbal
You can build a plan to hit your goals and consistently operate with focus and drive
You have experience in launching finance, tax, and/or reporting products for customers
You have experience managing teams and driving large-scale, cross-functional initiatives
You have a bias for action, are energized by ambiguity, and take ownership from start to finish
You're analytical – You rely on data to guide decisions, and are comfortable pulling your own data in SQL or modeling in Excel.
You're persuasive and a relationship-builder – You communicate clearly and effectively, adapting your style to collaborate and build alignment across teams and levels.

You're comfortable leveraging AI tools to improve productivity, decision-making, and problem-solving. You should be actively exploring and applying AI in your day-to-day work, bringing a beginner's mindset and curiosity as you continuously learn and adapt alongside evolving technology.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: high-growth or early-stage startup experience and experience leading a team are a plus
SQL experience is a strong plus

scope.surface: Merchant support experience — strategy and execution for merchants live on DoorDash platform
scope.business_model: marketplace / platform (B2B2C — serving merchant partners on DoorDash)
primary_metrics_inferred: Operational efficiency / scalability of merchant support
core_responsibilities: Build the strategy for helping merchants succeed once they're live on DoorDash by providing fast and seamless solutions when merchants face issues, minimizing operational friction
Use data-driven decision-making and sound business judgment to drive go-to-market & execution for new initiatives to help merchants have the best experience on DoorDash
Work cross-functionally with product, operations, marketing, sales, finance, and analytics teams to land key initiatives
Transform support into a tech-first, scalable, and seamless experience that drives merchant satisfaction, retention & loyalty

green_flags: Clear scope of ownership (merchant support strategy and execution)
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
Applications accepted on an ongoing basis (suggests active hiring)
red_flags: Location not specified in the JD body — unclear if this is fully remote, hybrid, or onsite; NYC Covey notice suggests possible NYC office tie but role geography is ambiguous
Finance/tax/reporting products experience listed as a required bullet but is unusual for a Strategy & Ops role — may filter unexpectedly
SQL listed both as a 'strong plus' (nice-to-have language) and as a direct must-have bullet ('comfortable pulling your own data in SQL') — creates ambiguity about how hard this requirement is
